    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    D

    DATA_FILE - Static variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.DataStorage
    File used for binary (serialized) storage of workout data.
    DataStorage - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic
    Handles reading and writing workout data to the file system.
    DataStorage() - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.DataStorage
    Private constructor to prevent instantiation.
    day - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Day of the week chosen in the drop-down.
    dayCombo - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel
    Drop-down for choosing the day of the week.
    dayOfWeek - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Day of the week when the workout took place (e.g.
    deleteButton - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel
    Button that requests deletion of the selected workout.
    displayName - Variable in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
     
    duration - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Duration as raw text — parsed to a number later by the controller.
    durationField - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel
    Input field for the workout duration in minutes.
    durationMinutes - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Duration of the workout in minutes.
